flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The College of New Jersey rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.3k → $19.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The College of New Jersey fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The College of New Jersey are 21% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($73.3k vs $60.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The College of New Jersey fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.6k → $25.8k).
